sn47.31:1.1:
1
At Sāvatthī. "‘This is the contemplation of the body in the body’—thus, bhikkhus,
in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision, knowledge, wisdom, true knowledge, and light.
sn47.31:1.2: "‘That contemplation of the body in the body is to be developed’ … ‘That contemplation of the body in the body has been developed’—thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision, knowledge, wisdom, true knowledge, and light.
sn47.31:2.1:
2
"‘This is the contemplation of feelings in feelings’ …
sn47.31:2.2:
3
"‘This is the contemplation of mind in mind’ …
sn47.31:3.1:
4
"‘This is the contemplation of phenomena in phenomena’—thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision, knowledge, wisdom, true knowledge, and light.
sn47.31:3.2: "‘That contemplation of phenomena in phenomena is to be developed’ … ‘That contemplation of phenomena in phenomena has been developed’—thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision, knowledge, wisdom, true knowledge, and light."
